com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

Interface IXLibraryImportFilter<O extends IXFilter>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXEvaluation<O>, IXPlugin

    public interface IXLibraryImportFilter<O extends IXFilter>
extends IXEvaluation<O>
    Any library import filter plugin should implement this interface and library import will call the plugin to get all the filters which needs to be applied during an import process. Two types of filters are currently supported : Object filter (IXObjectFilter) and property filter (IXPropertyFilter)

    Sample usage of the plugin implementation: 

                    public class DemoLibraryImportFilterPlugin implements IXLibraryImportFilter<IXFilter>{
                        public IXFilter[] getFilters()
                        {
                                return new IXFilter[]{  new DemoSupplierpartNumberFilter(), new DemoDevicePinPropertyFilter(),
                                                                new DemoDomainHousingFilter(), new DemoDomainPartFilter()       };
                        }
                };
    See Also:
    IXObjectFilter, IXPropertyFilter, IXEvaluation

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter.IXEvaluation

        getEvaluators

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion
